title: Hyperliquid Strategies CEO: 17M HYPE, Buybacks & the Equity Flywheel
summary_title: HSI bought $140M of Hype at $26 average, now trading 1.02x MNAV
summary_description: Public SPAC David discusses treasury strategy, yield enhancement plans, and Hyperliquid's AWS-like future with HIP3 and HIP4.

key_moments.label: Closed December 2nd, now holds 17M tokens total
First earnings call as public company CEO, nav dashboard launched
Website shows live token price, 1.02x MNAV, one-week lag on share count
Math: $1 Hype move ÷ 150M shares = impact to MNAV per share
Treasury framework: buy above 1.1x MNAV, sell below 0.9x
Considering yield enhancement via options, but cautiously, not venture risk
38% of Hype reserved for community—HPC announced using 1M tokens
HIP3 real, HIP4 prediction markets coming, Hyperliquid as AWS infrastructure

pull_quote: Bitcoin is going to trade like digital gold, Hype like equity of a business generating revenue
